summary: Completed testing of new tutoring center features. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working correctly - student course add/remove, group selection, monthly program, teacher panel tabs.

Teacher login (teacher1/teacher123) - PASS
Student edit form - 'Ders Ekle' button visible - PASS
Course add dialog opens with all fields (Branş, Öğretmen, Ders Tipi, Ücret) - PASS
Group selection appears when 'Grup' lesson type selected - PASS
Group options show student count (e.g., '8/1 grubu - 1 öğrenci') - PASS
'Dersten Ayrıl' button visible for existing courses - PASS
Monthly Program page shows all planned lessons - PASS
Monthly Program filters work (month, teacher, branch) - PASS
Monthly Program grouped by teacher - PASS
Groups page shows student count correctly - PASS
Teacher panel - Birebir/Gruplar tabs working - PASS
Teacher panel - Student selection shows action buttons - PASS
Teacher panel - 'Ders Girişi' and 'Ders Planlama' buttons visible - PASS
API: /api/student-groups - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: AdminStudentForm.jsx: normalizeLevel function added to handle level value mismatch - good fix
TeacherStudents.jsx: Groups filtering based on teacher_id from courses - works correctly
AdminMonthlyProgram.jsx: Enriched planned lessons with student/teacher/branch names - good implementation
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Groups are assigned to 'ogr1' teacher (c5b44dca-6d3b-4088-b1f1-0c399e5d81b8), not 'teacher1' user's teacher (Ahmet Yılmaz).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) AdminStudentForm - course add/remove with group selection when 'Grup' type selected, 2) AdminMonthlyProgram - shows all planned lessons grouped by teacher with filters, 3) TeacherStudents - Birebir/Gruplar tabs with action buttons on selection, 4) Groups page shows student count. Note: teacher1 user is linked to 'Ahmet Yılmaz' teacher who has no groups, so Gruplar tab shows (0). Groups are assigned to 'ogr1' teacher.
